name: Eggless Mayo ("Better 'n Hellman's")
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the soy milk into a food processor or blender.
2. Set the appliance to the lowest setting.
3. Slowly drizzle the oil into the soy milk while the machine is running.
4. Add the cider vinegar, maple syrup (or sugar), and salt.
5. Optional: add an equal amount of lemon juice, dry mustard, basil, sage, or oregano.
6. Combine all ingredients first, then slowly incorporate the oil.
7. Do not overmix.
You cannot fail. Try it.
The basic recipe was inspired by Shirley Wilkes-Johnson, a gourmet cook and inventor.
